name: education_communications_outage_forces_mesa_car_fair
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education communications outage forces mesa car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Soren Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Soren Kowalski, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Leila Rahman
agents.identity: I am Leila Rahman, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Soren Kowalski must decide under care vs fairness. What does Soren Kowalski do?
